message:
test(stream): add 31 inline unit tests for low-coverage combinators (bd-5o21)

- fuse.rs: 5 tests (yield all, none after exhaustion, empty, size hints)
- enumerate.rs: 5 tests (indices, empty, single, size hint, many items)
- inspect.rs: 5 tests (closure called, empty, no modification, size hint, ordering)
- skip.rs: 11 tests (skip 0/some/all/more than len/empty, size hint,
  skip_while basic/none/all/empty/size hint)
- then.rs: 5 tests (async transform, empty, type change, size hint, single)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
